name: coma
description: Clon estático de comunicacionenmallorca.com con control total del código.

scripts.format:check: prettier --check scripts tests package.json README.md playwright.config.js eslint.config.js
scripts.format: prettier --write scripts tests package.json README.md playwright.config.js eslint.config.js
scripts.test: npm run lint:js && npm run test:e2e
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run test
